bits.name: DMA_PAUSE
bits.comment: Active High, pause all the channels. Note: If "DMA_PAUSE" asserted active when the DMA is busy, DMA would finish the current fragment before enter Pause State.

bits.name: DMA_PAUSE_STATUS
bits.comment: DMA Pause status. 0 : In active state. 1 : In Pause state.

bits.name: DMA_FRAG_WAIT
bits.comment: Wait Time between two successive Fragment. With unit of AHB clock.

bits.name: O_ENDIAN
bits.comment: DMA output endian, 0- little endian 1- big endian

bits.name: REQ_PEND_EN[31:0]
bits.comment: Requests Pending Enable. Acitve high, enable DMA_REQ[31:0] to wakeup DMA, when MCU deep sleep;

bits.name: REQ_PEND_EN[63:32]
bits.comment: Requests Pending Enable. Acitve high, enable DMA_REQ[63:32] to wakeup DMA, when MCU deep sleep;

bits.name: DMA_INT_RAW_STATUS
bits.comment: DMA 32 Channels Interrupt Raw Status. 0 : No Interrupt need to be served. 1 : Interrupt need to be served.

bits.name: DMA_INT_MASK_STATUS
bits.comment: DMA 32 Channels Interrupt Mask Status. 0 : No Interrupt need to be served. 1 : Interrupt need to be served.

bits.name: DMA_REQ_STATUS
bits.comment: DMA 32 Channels Request Status. 0 : No Request need to be served. 1 : Request need to be served.

bits.name: DMA_EN_STATUS
bits.comment: DMA 32 Channels Enable Status. 0 : Channel Not Enabled. 1 : Channel Enabled.

bits.name: DEST_FSM_STATUS
bits.comment: Destination Side FSM status. 4'd0: IDLE 4'd1: calculate burst parameter 4'd2: calculate data number of burst 4'd3: wait enough data buffer space for write burst 4'd4: start write burst 4'd5: write burst execute 4'd6: wait fragment done or limit outstanding number 4'd7: fragment write done

bits.name: SRC_FSM_STATUS
bits.comment: Source Side FSM status. 4'd0: IDLE 4'd1: calculate burst parameter 4'd2: calculate data number of burst 4'd3: wait enough data buffer space for read burst 4'd4: start read burst 4'd5: read burst execute 4'd6: wait fragment done or limit outstanding number 4'd7: fragment read done

bits.name: MAIN_FSM_STATUS
bits.comment: MAIN FSM status. 5'd0: IDLE 5'd1: load link list pointer 5'd2: load link list source and dest address 5'd3: load link list fragment and block length 5'd4: load link list transaction length and src/dest transfer step 5'd5: load link list wrap_ptr and wrap_to 5'd6: load full mode source and dest address 5'd7: load full mode fragment and block length 5'd8: load full mode transaction length and src/dest transfer step 5'd9: load full mode wrap_ptr and wrap_to 5'd10: update block length 5'd11: update transaction length 5'd12: fragment execute 5'd13: load list pointer and use src/dest fragment step 5'd14: load src/dest block step 5'd15: load link list high 4bits pointer and src/dest fragment step 5'd16: load src/dest block step 5'd17: transaction or link list done 5'd18: update wrap info.

bits.name: HREADY_DMAR
bits.comment: dma read hready

bits.name: HREADY_DMAW
bits.comment: dma write hready

bits.name: DMA_BUSY
bits.comment: DMA Busy Status.

bits.name: CHN_ARB_SEL
bits.comment: Channel Arbitrator Selection Status;

bits.name: DATA_MODE
bits.comment: CRC data mode bit0: In data byte receive bit1: In data bit receive bit2: Out data byte receive bit3: Out data bit receive

bits.name: CRC_GEN_SIZE
bits.comment: CRC generator size 2'b0:crc8 2'b1:crc16 2'b10:crc24 2'b11:crc32

bits.name: CRC_INIT_MODE
bits.comment: CRC initial mode 2'b0:frag done 2'b1:blk done 2'b10:trsc done

bits.name: CRC_CH_NUM
bits.comment: DMA channel number for CRC check

bits.name: CRC_HOLD
bits.comment: CRC hold

bits.name: CRC_EN
bits.comment: CRC enable

bits.name: CRC_CLK_GATE_EN
bits.comment: CRC clock gate enable

bits.name: CRC_GEN
bits.comment: CRC32 generator

bits.name: CRC_OUT_XOR
bits.comment: CRC out data xor

bits.name: CRC_INIT
bits.comment: CRC init val

bits.name: chksum_endian_sel
bits.comment: 0: big endian 1: little endian

bits.name: chksum_dest_bypass
bits.comment: 0: dest trans enable 1: dest trans bypass

bits.name: hash_len_bit
bits.comment: hash padding length

bits.name: CHN_PAUSE
bits.comment: Channel Pause Enable. 0 : Channel in active mode. 1 : Channel pause. Active high, only pause the channel. If the CHN_PAUSE asserted when the channel is busy, it should be paused after the current fragment finished.

bits.name: CHN_PAUSE_STATUS
bits.comment: Channel Pause status.

bits.name: CHN_REQ
bits.comment: Channel Software DMA Request.

bits.name: CHN_EXREQ_MODE
bits.comment: Channel External DMA Request Mode: 1- level, 0- edge

bits.name: CHN_EXREQ_LEVEL
bits.comment: Channel External DMA Valid Level: 1- high, 0- low

bits.name: CHN_EN
bits.comment: Channel Enable: 0 : Disable the channel. 1 : Enable the channel.

bits.name: LLIST_EN
bits.comment: Link list Enable, only available for full DMA channel. 0 : Disable the link list. 1 : Enable the link list.

bits.name: LLIST_CFG_VALID
bits.comment: If "LLIST_EN" asserted, active high indicates Link list configure valid. 0 : Link list configure in-valid. DMA controller need obtain link list configure information by link list pointer. 1 : link list configure information valid. DMA controller would continue to complete the node and clear this bit. Note: Strongly recommend to observe only. Carefully writing to this bit, which may cause DMA crashed. If had to do so, pause this channel before changing.

bits.name: CHN_PRIORITY
bits.comment: Channel Request Priority. Four level of Priority supported as list : 2'b00 : Lowest priority. 2'b01 : Secondary lowest priority. 2'b10 : Tertiary lowest priority. 2'b11 : Highest priority.

bits.name: AHB_BURST_SEL
ERR_TYPE_STATUS
CHN_FRAGMENT_INT_EN
bits.comment: Fragment done interrupt enable.

bits.name: CHN_BLK_INT_EN
bits.comment: Block done interrupt enable.

bits.name: CHN_TRSC_INT_EN
bits.comment: Transaction done interrupt enable

bits.name: CHN_LLIST_INT_EN
bits.comment: Link list done interrupt enable

bits.name: CHN_CFG_ERR_INT_EN
bits.comment: Configuration error interrupt enable.

bits.name: CHN_FRAGMENT_INT_RAW_STATUS
bits.comment: Fragment done Raw interrupt status.

bits.name: CHN_BLK_INT_RAW_STATUS
bits.comment: Block done interrupt status.

bits.name: CHN_TRSC_INT_RAW_STATUS
bits.comment: Channel Transaction interrupts status.

bits.name: CHN_LLIST_INT_RAW_STATUS
bits.comment: Channel Link List interrupts status.

bits.name: CHN_CFG_ERR_INT_RAW_STATUS
bits.comment: Configuration error raw interrupts status.

bits.name: CHN_FRAGMENT_INT_MASK_STATUS
bits.comment: Channel Fragment Masked interrupts status.

bits.name: CHN_BLK_INT_MASK_STATUS
bits.comment: Channel Block Masked interrupts status.

bits.name: CHN_TRSC_INT_MASK_STATUS
bits.comment: Channel Transaction Masked interrupts status.

bits.name: CHN_LLIST_INT_MASK_STATUS
bits.comment: Channel Link list Masked interrupt status.

bits.name: CHN_CFG_ERR_INT_MASK_STATUS
bits.comment: Configuration error masked interrupt status.

bits.name: CHN_FRAGMENT_INT_CLR
bits.comment: Fragment done interrupt clear.

bits.name: CHN_BLK_INT_CLR
bits.comment: Block done interrupt clear.

bits.name: CHN_TRSC_INT_CLR
bits.comment: Transaction done interrupt clear

bits.name: CHN_LLIST_INT_CLR
bits.comment: Link list done interrupt clear

bits.name: CHN_CFG_ERR_INT_CLR
bits.comment: Configuration error interrupt clear.

bits.name: CHN_SRC_ADDR
bits.comment: Channel Source Address

bits.name: CHN_DEST_ADDR
bits.comment: Channel Destination Address

bits.name: FRG_LEN
bits.comment: Fragment Length, with byte unit. Max 128K-1 bytes

bits.name: BLK_LEN_REC_H
bits.comment: Block counter[16:15], update after each fragment done; Note: Normally configured to 2'b0. Only to be configured other value during state retention after wake up

bits.name: LLIST_END
bits.comment: Link list end flag. Active only when "LLIST_EN" asserted.

bits.name: SRC_ADDR_FIX_EN
bits.comment: Source Address Fix Enable: 0 : Disable Source Address Fix mode. 1 : Enable Source Address Fix mode. Active High would make source address fixed within the fragment, while "FRAG_STEP" and "BLK_STEP" would be applied to address after fragment done;

bits.name: DEST_ADDR_FIX_EN
bits.comment: Selection of the side using Address Fix mode. 0 : Disable Destination Address Fix mode. 1 : Enable Destination Address Fix mode. Active High would make destination address fixed within the fragment, while "FRAG_STEP" and "BLK_STEP" would be applied to address after fragment done;

bits.name: ADDR_WRAP_EN
bits.comment: Active High enable Address-wrapping for ring buffer. The next address of DMA jumps to "WRAP_START_ADDR" address when the current address matches "WRAP_END_ADDR" address: 0 : Disable address wrap mode. 1 : Enable address wrap mode. "WRAP_START_ADDR" and "WRAP_END_ADDR" would be used to limit the address space of either Source or Destination.

bits.name: ADDR_WRAP_SEL
bits.comment: Selection of the side using Address wrap mode. 0 : Address wrap on Source. 1 : Address wrap on Destination. Only one side of a DMA channel can activate address-wrapping mode at a time.

bits.name: REQ_MODE
SWT_MODE
DEST_SIZE
bits.comment: Destination AHB Size. 2'b00 : Byte; 2'b01 : Half Word 2'b10 : Word 2'b11 : DWord.

bits.name: SRC_SIZE
bits.comment: Source AHB Size. 2'b00 : Byte; 2'b01 : Half Word 2'b10 : Word 2'b11 : DWord.

bits.name: BLK_LEN
bits.comment: Block Length, with byte unit. Max 128K-1 bytes

bits.name: BLK_LEN_REC_L
bits.comment: Block counter[14:0], update after each fragment done; Note: Normally configured to 15'b0. Only to be configured other value during state retention after wake up

bits.name: LLIST_DEDICATED_COUNT_EN
bits.comment: Counter enable dedicated for a certain linklist, only valid when linklist enable

bits.name: LLIST_DEDICATED_INT_EN
bits.comment: Interrupt global enable dedicated for a certain linklist, only valid when linklist enable

bits.name: TRSC_LEN
bits.comment: Transaction Length, with byte unit. (Max 256M-1 bytes)

bits.name: SRC_TRSF_STEP
bits.comment: Channel destination side transfer step, with byte unit.

bits.name: DEST_TRSF_STEP
bits.comment: Channel Source side transfer step, with byte unit.

bits.name: WRAP_PTR
bits.comment: Wrap jump pointer address. Once the transfer address reaches WPPT, the next address jumps to the WPTO address after completing the WPPT data transfer.

bits.name: CHN_SRC_ADDR[35:32]
bits.comment: Chn source address high 4bits

bits.name: WRAP_TO
bits.comment: Wrap jump-to address. Once the transfer address reaches WPPT, the next address jumps to the WPTO address after completing the WPPT data transfer.

bits.name: CHN_DEST_ADDR_35_32
bits.comment: Chn Destination address high 4bits

bits.name: LLIST_PTR
bits.comment: Link List pointer. Must DWord align.

bits.name: SRC_FRAG_STEP
bits.comment: Channel Source side transfer step. With byte unit.

bits.name: DEST_FRAG_STEP
bits.comment: Channel Destination side transfer step. With byte unit.

bits.name: CHN_SRC_BLK_STEP
bits.comment: Channel Source block step. With byte unit.

bits.name: LLIST_PTR_35_32
bits.comment: Link List pointer high 4bits

bits.name: CHN_DEST_BLK_STEP
bits.comment: Channel Destination block step. With byte unit.

bits.name: REQ_CID
bits.comment: Req channel identify number

bits.name: CHN_1_DMA_ADDR_RD
bits.comment: channel 1 dma addr read monitor write bit0 to 1'b1, dma addr monitor value reset to 0xffffffff

bits.name: CHN_1_DMA_ADDR_WR
bits.comment: channel 1 dma addr write monitor write bit0 to 1'b1, dma addr monitor value reset to 0xffffffff

bits.name: CHN_2_DMA_ADDR_RD
bits.comment: channel 2 dma addr read monitor write bit0 to 1'b1, dma addr monitor value reset to 0xffffffff

bits.name: CHN_2_DMA_ADDR_WR
bits.comment: channel 2 dma addr write monitor write bit0 to 1'b1, dma addr monitor value reset to 0xffffffff

bits.name: CHN_3_DMA_ADDR_RD
bits.comment: channel 3 dma addr read monitor write bit0 to 1'b1, dma addr monitor value reset to 0xffffffff

bits.name: CHN_3_DMA_ADDR_WR
bits.comment: channel 3 dma addr write monitor write bit0 to 1'b1, dma addr monitor value reset to 0xffffffff

bits.name: CHN_4_DMA_ADDR_RD
bits.comment: channel 4 dma addr read monitor write bit0 to 1'b1, dma addr monitor value reset to 0xffffffff

bits.name: CHN_4_DMA_ADDR_WR
bits.comment: channel 4 dma addr write monitor write bit0 to 1'b1, dma addr monitor value reset to 0xffffffff

bits.name: CHN_5_DMA_ADDR_RD
bits.comment: channel 5 dma addr read monitor write bit0 to 1'b1, dma addr monitor value reset to 0xffffffff

bits.name: CHN_5_DMA_ADDR_WR
bits.comment: channel 5 dma addr write monitor write bit0 to 1'b1, dma addr monitor value reset to 0xffffffff

bits.name: CHN_6_DMA_ADDR_RD
bits.comment: channel 6 dma addr read monitor write bit0 to 1'b1, dma addr monitor value reset to 0xffffffff

bits.name: CHN_6_DMA_ADDR_WR
bits.comment: channel 6 dma addr write monitor write bit0 to 1'b1, dma addr monitor value reset to 0xffffffff

bits.name: CHN_7_DMA_ADDR_RD
bits.comment: channel 7 dma addr read monitor write bit0 to 1'b1, dma addr monitor value reset to 0xffffffff

bits.name: CHN_7_DMA_ADDR_WR
bits.comment: channel 7 dma addr write monitor write bit0 to 1'b1, dma addr monitor value reset to 0xffffffff

bits.name: CHN_8_DMA_ADDR_RD
bits.comment: channel 8 dma addr read monitor write bit0 to 1'b1, dma addr monitor value reset to 0xffffffff

bits.name: CHN_8_DMA_ADDR_WR
bits.comment: channel 8 dma addr write monitor write bit0 to 1'b1, dma addr monitor value reset to 0xffffffff

bits.name: CHN_9_DMA_ADDR_RD
bits.comment: channel 9 dma addr read monitor write bit0 to 1'b1, dma addr monitor value reset to 0xffffffff

bits.name: CHN_9_DMA_ADDR_WR
bits.comment: channel 9 dma addr write monitor write bit0 to 1'b1, dma addr monitor value reset to 0xffffffff

bits.name: CHN_10_DMA_ADDR_RD
bits.comment: channel 10 dma addr read monitor write bit0 to 1'b1, dma addr monitor value reset to 0xffffffff

bits.name: CHN_10_DMA_ADDR_WR
bits.comment: channel 10 dma addr write monitor write bit0 to 1'b1, dma addr monitor value reset to 0xffffffff

bits.name: CHN_11_DMA_ADDR_RD
bits.comment: channel 11 dma addr read monitor write bit0 to 1'b1, dma addr monitor value reset to 0xffffffff

bits.name: CHN_11_DMA_ADDR_WR
bits.comment: channel 11 dma addr write monitor write bit0 to 1'b1, dma addr monitor value reset to 0xffffffff

bits.name: CHN_12_DMA_ADDR_RD
bits.comment: channel 12 dma addr read monitor write bit0 to 1'b1, dma addr monitor value reset to 0xffffffff

bits.name: CHN_12_DMA_ADDR_WR
bits.comment: channel 12 dma addr write monitor write bit0 to 1'b1, dma addr monitor value reset to 0xffffffff

bits.name: CHN_13_DMA_ADDR_RD
bits.comment: channel 13 dma addr read monitor write bit0 to 1'b1, dma addr monitor value reset to 0xffffffff

bits.name: CHN_13_DMA_ADDR_WR
bits.comment: channel 13 dma addr write monitor write bit0 to 1'b1, dma addr monitor value reset to 0xffffffff

bits.name: CHN_14_DMA_ADDR_RD
bits.comment: channel 14 dma addr read monitor write bit0 to 1'b1, dma addr monitor value reset to 0xffffffff

bits.name: CHN_14_DMA_ADDR_WR
bits.comment: channel 14 dma addr write monitor write bit0 to 1'b1, dma addr monitor value reset to 0xffffffff

bits.name: LLI_NODE_COUNTER
bits.comment: Linklist Node Counter of Dma Channel n
